languages.text: "То есть твой прямой командир — Дунавски, но ты сторонник Батошски?"
"So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"
languages.original_text: "То есть твой прямой командир — Дунавски, но ты сторонник Батошски?"

traits.locale_text: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"
"So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"
"So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"

languages.text: 「つまり、あなたの直属の上司はダナウスキーだが、あなたはバトシュスキーを支持しているのか？」
languages.original_text: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"

languages.text: "Yani Dunawski'nin emrinde olsan da Batoshski'yi destekliyorsun, öyle mi?"
languages.original_text: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"

traits.locale_text: "Yani Dunawski'nin emrinde olsan da Batoshski'yi destekliyorsun, öyle mi?"

languages.text: “所以你的直属指挥官是杜纳芙斯卡，但你支持巴托什斯基？”
languages.original_text: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"

traits.locale_text: “所以你的直属指挥官是杜纳芙斯卡，但你支持巴托什斯基？”

languages.text: "Eure direkte Vorgesetzte ist also Dunawski, aber Ihr seid ein Unterstützer von Batoshski?"
languages.original_text: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure direkte Vorgesetzte ist also Dunawski, aber Ihr seid ein Unterstützer von Batoshski?"

languages.text: « Donc si je comprends bien, vous êtes sous les ordres directs de Dunawski, mais vous soutenez Batoshski ? »
languages.original_text: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"

traits.locale_text: « Donc si je comprends bien, vous êtes sous les ordres directs de Dunawski, mais vous soutenez Batoshski ? »

languages.text: «Entonces, su comandante directa es Dunawski, pero apoya a Batoshski?».
languages.original_text: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"
